assertions.title: Top nav bar renders on all public pages

steps.expected: Top nav with logo, search icon, user icon visible
steps.observed: Top nav with WC StubHub logo, search icon, user icon visible
Top nav with same elements visible
Top nav with same elements visible
Top nav with same elements visible

assertions.title: Top nav does NOT render on admin pages

steps.expected: Redirected to admin login, no public top nav or footer
steps.observed: Admin login page shown without public top nav bar or footer
Admin dashboard rendered with admin sidebar, no public top nav or footer

evidence.network: Admin login and dashboard loaded successfully

assertions.title: Logo in top nav navigates home

steps.observed: Football page loaded with top nav
Navigated to http://localhost:3000/

assertions.title: Search icon in top nav opens search overlay

steps.action: On homepage, click 'Open search' button in top nav
steps.expected: Full-screen search overlay opens with trending items
steps.observed: Search overlay opened showing search input, TRENDING section with PRODUCTS and EVENTS

assertions.title: User icon behavior based on auth state

steps.action: Clear cookies to ensure logged-out state
steps.observed: Cookies cleared, user icon shows 'Go to login'
Navigated to http://localhost:3000/login
Logged in, user icon changed to avatar circle with 'Go to profile' label
Navigated to http://localhost:3000/my with profile menu

assertions.title: Top nav is sticky/fixed on scroll

steps.observed: Homepage loaded

steps.expected: Top nav remains pinned at top
steps.observed: Top nav remained fixed at top of viewport, content scrolled beneath it
Top nav still pinned at top, significantly scrolled content visible below

assertions.title: Top nav and bottom tab bar coexist without overlap

steps.expected: Both top nav and bottom tab bar visible, content between them with proper padding
steps.observed: Top nav (WC StubHub, search, user icon) at top and bottom tab bar (Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My) at bottom, with carousel content between. No overlap.

assertions.title: No horizontal overflow from nav or footer at 375px

steps.observed: Viewport set to 375x812

steps.action: Check scrollWidth vs clientWidth on body and documentElement
steps.observed: scrollWidth=375, clientWidth=375, hasOverflow=false

steps.expected: Footer fits within 375px, all text readable
steps.observed: Footer renders cleanly at 375px with company info, quick links, legal links, and trust banner all readable

steps.action: Check scrollWidth again at footer position
steps.observed: scrollWidth=375, clientWidth=375, hasOverflow=false

assertions.title: No console errors from nav and footer

steps.observed: Console cleared
Zero console errors
Zero console errors
Zero console errors
No errors reported across all pages

evidence.network: All pages loaded with 200, no error responses

summary: Tested 9 assertions: all 9 passed. Top nav renders correctly on all public pages with logo, search, and user icon. Admin pages correctly exclude the public nav. Logo navigation, search overlay, and auth-aware user icon all work as specified. Nav is sticky on scroll, coexists with bottom tab bar without overlap, has no horizontal overflow at 375px, and produces zero console errors.
